sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Adaptive Hedged Multi-Asset Income ETF (NYSE:AMAX)
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information and share price data for the Adaptive Hedged Multi-Asset Income ETF (AMAX). It includes current share price, market capitalization, share price movements, 52-week high and low, daily average trading volume, and past dividend payments. The report also addresses common FAQs regarding AMAX's performance and key dates.

feed.title: Airgain receives $4M order from IoT solutions provider
feed.summary: Airgain Inc. has secured a $4 million order from an existing IoT solutions provider, with shipments expected to be completed within 12 months. This order represents approximately 8% of the company's trailing twelve-month revenue and reinforces Airgain's strong relationships in the IoT sector. Despite a recent earnings miss in Q4 2025, Airgain is expanding its technological offerings through strategic partnerships and new platforms.

feed.title: ZTR Stock Fund Price and Chart — NYSE:ZTR
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of the Virtus Total Return Fund Inc. (ZTR), a closed-end diversified investment fund. It details the stock's price performance, key financial statistics, company information, and technical indicators. Additionally, it lists ETFs that hold ZTR stock.

feed.title: Greene Concepts Inc. Reaffirms Commitment to Source Protection and Quality Standards for Be Water
feed.summary: Greene Concepts Inc. (INKW) emphasizes its rigorous standards for sourcing and quality in its Be Water brand. The premium artesian spring water is drawn from a protected aquifer in the Blue Ridge Mountains, ensuring purity through natural filtration and controlled, on-site bottling. CEO Lenny Greene highlights the company's commitment to source integrity and consistent quality to build consumer trust.

feed.title: New YETI CFO From Home Depot May Reshape Growth And Capital Choices
feed.summary: YETI Holdings has appointed Scott Bomar, formerly of The Home Depot, as its new Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Mike McMullen. This change is significant for investors as Bomar's extensive experience in complex and multi-channel businesses could influence YETI's capital allocation, growth strategies, and operational focus. The transition occurs during a busy period for YETI, with ongoing share buybacks, new earnings guidance, and brand building initiatives.

feed.title: United Airlines Canada Card Aims To Deepen Loyalty And Revenue Mix
feed.summary: United Airlines has partnered with Neo Financial to launch a co-branded credit card in Canada, offering travel perks and accelerated miles earning for Canadian customers. This initiative aims to expand United's loyalty program, deepen customer engagement, and generate non-ticket revenue, addressing an important cross-border market. While it could smooth earnings and increase competitiveness, potential risks include higher customer acquisition costs and reliance on a partner-based model.

feed.title: Philip Morris Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.47 per Share, Payable April 13 to Holders of Record as of March 19
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (PM) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.47 per share. This dividend is payable on April 13 to shareholders of record as of March 19. The announcement was made on March 4th.

feed.title: Lobe Sciences Ltd. Announces Presence in Miami During the Jefferies and Leerink Healthcare Conferences
feed.summary: Lobe Sciences Ltd., a Canadian biopharmaceutical company, announced that its CEO, Dr. Frederick D. Sancilio, will be in Miami, Florida, during the upcoming Jefferies and Leerink Healthcare Conferences. He will be available for meetings with investors, pharmaceutical companies, and other organizations to discuss the company's therapeutic programs, including L-130 for chronic cluster headache and S-100 for sickle cell disease. Lobe Sciences focuses on advancing assets through subsidiary entities with defined development and funding structures.

feed.title: Is Williams Companies Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: The Williams Companies, Inc. (WMB) has demonstrated significant outperformance compared to the S&P 500 Index, with year-to-date gains of 26.1% and a 33.4% increase over the past 52 weeks. As a major energy infrastructure company, WMB remains strategically strong despite missing Q4 EPS estimates narrowly, driven by a robust asset portfolio and strategic acquisitions. Analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating for WMB, forecasting a modest upside from its current price levels.

feed.title: NYSE-owner ICE forges strategic partnership with crypto exchange OKX
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), owner of the New York Stock Exchange, has announced a strategic partnership with cryptocurrency exchange OKX. This collaboration involves ICE licensing OKX's spot crypto prices for crypto futures products and OKX offering ICE futures and tokenized equities. ICE has also made a strategic investment in OKX, which reflects a $25 billion valuation.

feed.title: Orion Porfolio Solutions LLC Grows Holdings in Walmart Inc. $WMT
feed.summary: Orion Portfolio Solutions LLC increased its stake in Walmart Inc. (WMT) by 6.1% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 661,098 shares valued at $68.13 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in Walmart, and analysts have issued various ratings, with the stock currently holding a "Moderate Buy" average rating and an average target price of $134.42. The article also details recent insider stock sales, key news impacting Walmart, and its financial performance.

feed.title: KCM Investment Advisors LLC Sells 6,650 Shares of Deere & Company $DE
feed.summary: KCM Investment Advisors LLC decreased its stake in Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) by 46.0% in the third quarter, selling 6,650 shares and retaining 7,822 shares valued at $3,577,000. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp increased their holdings. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Deere & Company, with a target price of $647.20.

feed.title: KCM Investment Advisors LLC Raises Stock Position in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. $CDNS
feed.summary: KCM Investment Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CDNS) by 105.8% in the third quarter, bringing their total holdings to $3.312 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., State Street Corp, and Geode Capital Management LLC also boosted their positions, indicating strong institutional confidence in the software maker. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $376.50, following Cadence Design Systems' Q4 EPS and revenue beat and positive guidance for 2026.

feed.title: KCM Investment Advisors LLC Decreases Stake in NextEra Energy, Inc. $NEE
feed.summary: KCM Investment Advisors LLC reduced its stake in NextEra Energy, Inc. by 4.2% in the third quarter, now owning 366,065 shares valued at $27.63 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and 78.72% of the stock is held by hedge funds and institutions. The company recently announced an increased quarterly dividend and reported Q3 earnings that beat estimates, though revenue was below expectations.

feed.title: What’s next for First Solar?
feed.summary: First Solar's share price recently dropped following its 2025 results and 2026 guidance, despite significant investments in U.S. manufacturing capacity and a shift towards domestic production. The company is restructuring its Southeast Asian operations into front-end production hubs, with finished modules assembled in South Carolina to leverage 45X tax credits. Wall Street's reaction was unexpected, given the company's clear disclosures and strengthened financial position post-IRA, suggesting a misinterpretation of its strategic recalibration.

feed.title: GW&K Investment Management Reduces Stake in Ameris Bancorp
feed.summary: GW&K Investment Management LLC has reduced its stake in Ameris Bancorp by 9.4% during the third quarter of 2025, selling 68,862 shares. Despite this reduction, the asset management firm still holds 663,330 shares valued at $48.63 million, representing nearly 1% of the bank's outstanding stock. This move suggests a potentially more cautious outlook by GW&K, though their continued significant holding indicates they still see value in Ameris Bancorp.

feed.title: UAL: Rothschild & Co Maintains Rating but Lowers Price Target |
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co maintains a 'Buy' rating for United Airlines Holdings (UAL) but has lowered its price target from $125.00 to $110.00 USD, a 12% decrease. Despite this adjustment, analysts generally hold a positive outlook for UAL with continued 'Buy' and 'Overweight' ratings. While the average analyst target price suggests a significant upside, GuruFocus's GF Value estimates a downside from the current price.

feed.title: Samsung Display Wins Largest Share of OLED Orders for Apple's iPhone 17e
feed.summary: Samsung Display has secured the majority of OLED panel orders for Apple's new entry-level iPhone 17e, overturning earlier predictions that BOE would be the main supplier. This allocation is largely due to reported production quality issues at BOE, which have led to temporary halts in their iPhone OLED production. LG Display and BOE are expected to supply the remaining panels, with Samsung Display maintaining its dominant position similar to the iPhone 16e orders.

feed.title: Zevra Therapeutics Appoints Justin Renz as Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: Zevra Therapeutics, a commercial-stage company focused on rare disease therapies, announced the appointment of Justin Renz as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective March 9, 2026. Renz brings over 25 years of financial leadership experience in the biopharmaceutical industry, with a strong background in capital markets, strategic transactions, and commercial operations. His appointment is expected to strengthen the company's financial foundation and support its growth strategy in the rare disease sector.

feed.title: This Equinix Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Thursday
feed.summary: Several Wall Street analysts have initiated coverage on various companies, marking a bullish outlook for some. Bernstein began coverage on Equinix Inc (EQIX) with an Outperform rating and a target of $1,128, while also initiating coverage on CoreWeave Inc (CRWV) with an Underperform rating and Crown Castle Inc (CCI) with an Outperform rating. Loop Capital gave Astera Labs Inc (ALAB) a Buy rating with a $250 price target, and Truist Securities initiated Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. (VNDA) with a Buy rating and an $18 price target.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Huntington Bancshares to $21 From $22, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has changed its price target for Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) to $21, down from $22, while reconfirming its "Buy" rating. This adjustment was announced on March 5, 2026. The financial institution continues to monitor the bank's performance and other analyst recommendations.

feed.title: Automatic Data Processing: Is ADP Still a Buy for 2026?
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) has recently released its latest figures and guidance, prompting Wall Street to analyze whether this "boring payroll giant" is a safe AI-fueled investment for 2026. The article suggests that ADP, known for its steady dividends and cash generation from serving over 1 million clients globally, offers predictable cash flow and exposure to data-driven HR and automation. While not a "lottery ticket" stock, ADP is presented as a high-quality compounder and a core holding for long-term investors seeking consistency and stability, despite concerns about its valuation and sensitivity to employment levels and interest rates.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Extra Space Storage to $170 From $164, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Extra Space Storage (EXR) to $170 from $164, while reaffirming its Overweight rating on the company's stock. This adjustment reflects Barclays' updated outlook on the specialized REIT. The article also briefly lists recent analyst adjustments from other firms like Goldman Sachs, RBC, Jefferies, and Wells Fargo, and mentions Extra Space Storage's recent financial results and dividend announcement.

feed.title: NiSource, Inc. Hits New 52-Week High of $47.67, Reflecting Strong Growth
feed.summary: NiSource, Inc. has reached a new 52-week high of $47.67, demonstrating strong performance with a 67.29% increase over the past year, significantly outperforming the S&P 500. The company, a mid-cap player in the gas industry, has a market capitalization of $22,373 million, a P/E ratio of 21.00, and an impressive dividend yield of 104.66%. Its balanced financial approach is further indicated by a debt-to-equity ratio of 1.68 and a return on equity of 10.69%.

feed.title: 50,603 Shares in Targa Resources, Inc. $TRGP Acquired by NFC Investments LLC
feed.summary: NFC Investments LLC recently acquired 50,603 shares of Targa Resources, Inc. (NYSE:TRGP) valued at approximately $8.48 million, making it their 14th largest holding. Despite this, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading shares worth around $19.26 million in the last three months. Targa Resources exceeded its quarterly EPS estimates, pays a $1.00 quarterly dividend, and holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $240.79.

feed.title: AutoZone, Inc. $AZO Shares Sold by NFC Investments LLC
feed.summary: NFC Investments LLC reduced its stake in AutoZone (AZO) by 7.0% in Q3, now owning 5,664 shares valued at $24.3 million. Despite insider selling activity, AutoZone reported a Q2 EPS beat and revenue growth of 8.2%, with management planning 350-360 new store openings in 2026. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target near $4,300, though some concerns exist regarding revenue shortfalls and margin pressure.

feed.title: Apollo Global Management Inc. $APO is NFC Investments LLC's 2nd Largest Position
feed.summary: NFC Investments LLC reduced its stake in Apollo Global Management (APO) by 4.3%, yet it remains the fund's second-largest holding, representing 11.4% of its portfolio. While Apollo beat quarterly earnings estimates, it faces significant legal and reputational risks, including multiple securities lawsuits and allegations related to Jeffrey Epstein. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $159.47, despite recent price target cuts and downgrades.

feed.title: Broadcom: AI Champion With Massive Growth (NASDAQ:AVGO)
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) recently reported Q1 earnings, surpassing revenue and profit expectations with 29% year-over-year growth. The company's accelerating business momentum and positive near-term outlook, combined with a recent valuation pullback, make it an attractive investment for AI-focused investors. The author has shifted to a bullish stance on AVGO due to improved growth prospects and a more reasonable valuation.

feed.title: American Electric Power Beats Q4 Revenue by $426 Million, Here’s What To Expect Next
feed.summary: American Electric Power (AEP) exceeded Q4 revenue estimates by $426 million and reported strong Q4 operating EPS, exceeding guidance. The company doubled its contracted load forecast to 56 gigawatts, largely due to hyperscaler and mega data center developments, and plans a significant $72 billion five-year capital expansion. Analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating, but TIKR's valuation model suggests a higher mid-case target, indicating potential undervaluation given AEP's growth prospects.

feed.title: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) to Issue $0.40 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, payable on April 10th to shareholders of record as of March 20th. This translates to an annualized dividend of $1.60 and a dividend yield of 2.0%, with a payout ratio suggesting the dividend is well-covered by earnings. The company recently reported Q4 earnings, missing EPS estimates but beating revenue expectations, and holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $91.17.

feed.title: Virtus Total Return Fund Inc. (NYSE:ZTR) Announces $0.05 Monthly Dividend
feed.summary: Virtus Total Return Fund Inc. (NYSE:ZTR) announced a monthly dividend of $0.05 per share, payable on March 30th to stockholders of record on March 16th. This represents an 8.6% dividend yield. The company's stock opened at $6.98 and has a 50-day moving average of $6.56 and a 200-day moving average of $6.46.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Adjusts Price Target on EOG Resources to $127 From $123, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for EOG Resources (NYSE: EOG) from $123 to $127 but maintained a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for EOG Resources, both upward and downward, over recent weeks. EOG Resources specializes in natural gas and crude oil exploration and production, with the majority of its sales coming from crude oil and condensed products in the United States.

feed.title: O’Reilly Auto Parts to pay $5.6M to WA workers for pregnancy-related discriminations
feed.summary: O’Reilly Auto Parts will pay $5.6 million to more than 50 women in Washington state who alleged pregnancy-related discrimination and retaliation at its Puyallup distribution center. A lawsuit filed by the Washington Attorney General's Office accused the company of failing to provide reasonable accommodations and retaliating against workers who requested them. The settlement includes O'Reilly agreeing to implement training and new policies to comply with Washington’s Healthy Starts Act and provide biannual compliance reports to the Attorney General's Office for the next four years.

feed.title: JT Stratford LLC Has $1.53 Million Stock Position in Verizon Communications Inc. $VZ
feed.summary: JT Stratford LLC significantly increased its stake in Verizon Communications, boosting its holdings by 300.2% to 34,852 shares, valued at approximately $1.53 million. This increase comes amidst insider selling by executives totaling over $10 million, though Verizon recently beat EPS estimates, issued positive FY2026 guidance, and raised its quarterly dividend, maintaining a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus. The article also details other institutional investor activity and Verizon's stock performance and financial metrics.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. $TMO Shares Sold by Geo Capital Gestora de Recursos Ltd
feed.summary: Geo Capital Gestora de Recursos Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. by 98.7% in Q3, selling over 6,000 shares. This comes as Thermo Fisher reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst expectations with 7.2% year-over-year revenue growth, and announced a $5.0 billion share buyback program and a dividend increase. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $633.68, reflecting overall positive sentiment despite some institutional trading activity.

feed.title: Municipal Employees Retirement System of Michigan Reduces Holdings in First Majestic Silver Corp. $AG
feed.summary: The Municipal Employees Retirement System of Michigan significantly decreased its stake in First Majestic Silver Corp. (NYSE:AG) by 81.7% in Q3, selling over 5 million shares but still holding 1.12 million shares valued at $13.84 million. Despite the pension fund's reduction, other institutional investors have either established new positions or increased their holdings in the company. First Majestic Silver recently reported beating EPS expectations but missing revenue targets, showcased strong year-over-year revenue growth, and increased its quarterly dividend, holding an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" with a $25 price target.

feed.title: Chubb Limited $CB Shares Purchased by JT Stratford LLC
feed.summary: JT Stratford LLC significantly increased its stake in Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 3,035 shares, bringing their total ownership to 4,162 shares valued at approximately $1.175 million. Chubb reported strong quarterly earnings of $7.52 EPS, beating expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.97. However, insider selling by EVP Timothy Alan Boroughs and CEO Evan G. Greenberg was noted in early February.

feed.title: Geo Capital Gestora de Recursos Ltd Sells 4,755 Shares of Cboe Global Markets, Inc. $CBOE
feed.summary: Geo Capital Gestora de Recursos Ltd significantly reduced its stake in Cboe Global Markets, selling 4,755 shares and retaining only 153 shares. Company insiders have also been net sellers, disposing of over 5,600 shares in the last 90 days. Despite this selling activity, Cboe Global Markets recently reported strong earnings, exceeding analyst expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Geo Capital Gestora de Recursos Ltd Boosts Stock Position in MSCI Inc $MSCI
feed.summary: Geo Capital Gestora de Recursos Ltd significantly increased its stake in MSCI Inc. by 166% in Q3, making it their third-largest holding. Institutional ownership of MSCI is high, and analysts generally rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $671.78. MSCI recently surpassed earnings and revenue estimates and raised its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Says "I Cannot Recommend a Stock I Really Like, Union Pacific, Until It Goes Lower"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer advised against buying Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP) despite liking the stock, due to its recent "parabolic move" and high valuation. He suggested waiting for the stock to drop by at least $30 from its current $265 price. A previous analyst report from Cullen Capital Management highlighted Union Pacific's strong network, potential merger with Norfolk Southern, and operational improvements, noting its 18x forward earnings and 2.4% dividend yield.

feed.title: Dow Inc. Stock: Quiet Materials Giant Making a Loud Comeback?
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) is being re-evaluated by investors, moving beyond its traditional image as a chemical stock. The company is focusing on high-margin materials, AI-optimized manufacturing, and a strong dividend strategy, making it an attractive option for income-focused and cyclical investors in the US. While not a high-growth "AI stock," Dow offers potential for stable returns as industrial activity recovers and demand for specialized materials in sectors like EVs and sustainable packaging increases.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Price Target on Darden Restaurants to $215 From $200, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for Darden Restaurants (NYSE: DRI) from $200 to $215, while keeping a "Hold" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated valuation for the restaurant company. Other recent analyst actions include Citigroup maintaining a "Buy" rating with a target of $235 and Truist trimming its target to $206, reiterating a "Hold."

feed.title: Investors Aren’t Giving Up on Emerging Markets Yet, BofA Says
feed.summary: Bank of America Corp. strategists report that investors are maintaining optimism in emerging markets despite rising global risks, particularly the conflict in the Middle East. Emerging nations like those in Eastern Europe, the Middle East, and Africa continue to attract record equity flows, indicating sustained investor confidence even amid geopolitical tensions. This trend suggests that higher risk appetites are still prevalent in these markets.

feed.title: Alcon Earnings Report: Q4 Overview
feed.summary: Alcon (NYSE: ALC) reported its Q4 earnings, missing estimated earnings by 7.14% with an EPS of $0.78 against an estimate of $0.84, although revenue increased by $225 million year-over-year. The company provided guidance for FY 2026, expecting earnings between $3.35 and $3.44 per share. This report includes a historical earnings summary and future guidance for investors.

feed.title: Is Booking Stock Outperforming Its Rivals?
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) stock has underperformed in the past year despite strong profitability and revenue growth, raising questions about its standing against competitors in the digital travel sector. The article compares BKNG's metrics like operating margin, LTM revenue growth, and PE ratio with peers such as Expedia, Airbnb, Marriott, Hilton, and Tripadvisor, highlighting its operational efficiency and strategic shifts. While BKNG shows robust fundamentals, investor concerns over macro risks and AI disruption have led to its recent stock drop.

feed.title: NiSource, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Market Dynamics
feed.summary: NiSource, Inc., a gas industry midcap, has adjusted its valuation due to changes in financial metrics and market position. The company reports a P/E ratio of 21, a price-to-book value of 2.34, and a strong dividend yield. Compared to its peers, NiSource holds a competitive position within the gas sector.

feed.title: Jim Cramer on Boeing: "It's The Right Stock, Right Time"
feed.summary: Jim Cramer views Boeing (BA) as "the right stock, right time" despite recent declines, attributing the drop to concerns about travel and the end of the bull market, as well as Middle East tensions. He maintains a significant position in his Trust, suggesting the stock should be bought due to its record orders. Cramer also acknowledged challenges like inefficiencies in defense contracts but highlighted Boeing's growing backlog.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics Reiterates Medium-Term Growth Targets For Next Three Years
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) has reiterated its medium-term growth targets for the next three years. This news item, sourced from Reuters, indicates the company's commitment to its previously announced strategic and financial objectives.

feed.title: 12 Health Care Stocks Moving In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: This article identifies 12 healthcare stocks experiencing significant movement in Thursday's pre-market session. It highlights both gainers, such as Impact BioMedical and BioXcel Therapeutics, and losers, including PepGen and Can Fite Biopharma, detailing their percentage changes and market capitalization. The movements are influenced by recent events like Q4 earnings reports.

feed.title: HawkSearch By Bridgeline Enhances eCommerce Search for Global Industrial and Medical Gas Provider
feed.summary: Bridgeline Digital, Inc. announced that a global industrial and medical gas provider has selected its HawkSearch platform to enhance eCommerce search capabilities. HawkSearch will provide advanced on-site search, product discovery, multi-language support, and personalized customer journeys to improve engagement and conversion rates. The solution is designed to handle complex product catalogs and business requirements for global organizations.
